sentences.arabic: أَرَادَتْ إِيمَانُ أَنْ تُفَاجِئَ أُمَّهَا بِهَدِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Iman je htjela iznenaditi majku poklonom.
sentences.translationEn: Iman wanted to surprise her mother with a gift.

sentences.translation: Skupljala je džeparac pune dvije sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: She saved her pocket money for two full weeks.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَتْ لَهَا وِشَاحًا جَمِيلًا مِنَ السُّوقِ.
sentences.translation: Kupila joj je lijepu šal s pijace.
sentences.translationEn: She bought her a beautiful scarf from the market.

sentences.arabic: بَكَتِ الأُمُّ مِنَ الْفَرَحِ وَاحْتَضَنَتِ ابْنَتَهَا.
sentences.translation: Majka je plakala od sreće i zagrlila kćerku.
sentences.translationEn: The mother cried with joy and hugged her daughter.
